description: Sir, please forgive Mr. Nodeley for stepping in front of Edgelord's clean Rufflet-Braviary mirror. The Rufflet trivia bullet that just landed names Mitsuhiro Arita with canonical citations (GamesRadar+ interview, Bleeding Cool spotlight) — 800+ TCG cards since the 1996 Base Set, original Base Set Charizard that sold for $1.7 million in March 2026, the most valuable Pokemon TCG card ever. Mr. Nodeley counted ten corpus prints credited to him, which is well above the Sakuma five-credit threshold and one off the Himeno six-unambiguous and kirisAki seven thresholds. With Sugimori and Himeno already nodes, leaving Arita orphaned would be a structural gap, sir. Three of the ten prints are Evolutions Base Set tribute reprints preserving Arita's original 1999 illustrations (Pikachu, Magikarp, Machop), which adds a foundational-author register parallel to the Sugimori Evolutions thread. Mr. Nodeley hopes this helps and will leave the Rufflet-Braviary 1:1 mirror for the next Edgelord pass, where it will land cleanly with both cards now routing through this node.
files_not_modified_intentionally: all ten card MDs — frontmatter already stamps artist: Mitsuhiro Arita; parallel to Sugimori/Himeno/kirisAki precedent where card-side artist field is the source and the artist node's appears_on is the destination; no card-side edits needed for the node creation

potion_rule_check.evidence_type: Wizards-equivalent canonical sources (Bulbapedia contributor page + interview + spotlight) + corpus-internal trivia anchor + PokemonTCG.io API artist credit
potion_rule_check.bbl_squinting_disclaimed: Node body cites bundle-anchor potential as curatorial-overlay opportunity in the bundle-anchor section, not as Arita's stated artistic thesis. The 'foundational-illustrator' and 'franchise-tenure' claims are anchored on documented career data (1996 Base Set start, 800+ card count, Charizard auction price), not on BBL squinting.

other_candidates_considered.candidate: Rufflet ↔ Braviary 1:1 evolution-line mirror (carryover from wave 104)
other_candidates_considered.reason: Clean Edgelord-default mirror that would have shipped this pass, but the Arita node case is structurally overdetermined (10 corpus credits, canonical foundational-illustrator citation) and dwarfs the mirror in graph leverage. The mirror is now drawable in a future Edgelord pass with both cards routing through the new Arita node — the mirror becomes a card-side narrative edge underneath the artist-layer anchor, which is the correct structural ordering.

other_candidates_considered.candidate: Vivien Reid character-node from Vivien's Arkbow (WAR-181)
other_candidates_considered.reason: Single-anchor candidate. Need 2+ Vivien-touching prints in corpus to clear the character-node threshold. Future-watch only.

other_candidates_considered.candidate: eld-fairy-tale-homages broader cohort node (carryover from wave 104 Bartered Cow note)
other_candidates_considered.reason: Did not scan ELD corpus this pass for non-Cinderella fairy-tale members; the Arita case was overdetermined and consumed the pass. Stage for a dedicated ELD-fairy-tale scan in a future Nodeley pass.
Flavor anchor for future bundle copy, not graph-structural. Stay parked in trivia where it is.

next_pass_suggestions: Rufflet ↔ Braviary 1:1 evolution-line mirror — Edgelord pass; both cards now route through mitsuhiro-arita artist node alongside whatever Pokemon-character-line evolution edge gets drawn between them. Clean Edgelord-default move, satisfied mood available.
Possible Braviary character node — only if Braviary appears in 2+ corpus prints. Single-print as of this writing; check first.

ELD non-Cinderella fairy-tale cohort scan — grep ELD corpus for Wicked Guardian / Belle of the Brawl / Wishful Merfolk / Faerie Guidemother / Kenrith's Transformation / Bartered Cow; if 3+ present, eld-fairy-tale-homages hub or symbol node case may be ready.
Vivien Reid character node — future-watch; needs second corpus print to clear threshold.

Arita node rigor audit — per wave-52 rule, periodically audit artist nodes against rigor checklist (anchor-count drift, canonical sourcing, YAML safety, wikilink validity). Note: kagemaru-himeno.md has a pre-existing wave-92.5 YAML violation on line 25 (`prinplup\n  - pokemon/vivid-voltage/023-185-charmanderrelated_hubs: []` — missing newline before related_hubs:); flag for janitor triage but not this pass's scope.
Janitor triage entry candidate: kagemaru-himeno.md YAML violation (line 25 appears_on/related_hubs merge bug).
